zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle於1442年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，他的父親Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby27歲，母親Elizabeth De Ferrers24歲。他於1487年之後與Joan Norton結婚。他去世於1492年7月17日在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年50歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle于1442年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，他的父亲Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby27岁，母亲Elizabeth De Ferrers24岁。他于1487年之后与Joan Norton结婚。他去世于1492年7月17日在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年50岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle was born in 1442, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth De Ferrers, was 24. He married Joan Norton after 1487. He died on 17 July 1492, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle est né en 1442, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Ferrers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Norton après 1487. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1492, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle 1442 in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Ferrers 24. Er hat nach 1487 Joan Norton geheiratet. Er starb am 17. Juli 1492 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Astley, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Astley, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle è nato il nel 1442 nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth De Ferrers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Norton dopo il 1487. Morì il 17 luglio 1492, nel Astley, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Astley, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisleが1442年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Grobyは27歳，母Elizabeth De Ferrersは24歳であった。1487年以後にJoan Nortonと結婚した。彼は1492年7月17日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで50歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Ferrers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1487년 이후 Joan Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1492년 7월 17일 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle nasceu em 1442, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Ferrers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Norton após 1487. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1492, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle родился в 1442 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Ferrers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Norton после 1487 г. Он умер 17 июля 1492 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle nació en 1442, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Ferrers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Norton después de 1487. Murió el 17 de julio de 1492, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
